action: Bind GitHub OIDC signature verification to fresh, unambiguous JWKS material.

progress.finding: A verified OIDC token must not rely on stale or ambiguous JWKS material; freshness and exact signing-key selection are separate gates before signature verification.
progress.verification: 4 deterministic Node tests passed in an isolated runtime using byte-identical files

handoff: Infrastructure verifiers should compose bounded retrieval -> freshness evaluation -> exact kid/alg/use selection -> cryptographic signature verification -> immutable run authorization. Freshness acceptance is not evidence that the JWT signature or claims are valid.
